Specifically, the event "pv added the 04 - Regression label" occurred on **October 1, 2012**. Other older issues, such as #1310 or #1580, which also have the `04 - Regression` label, are about the old polynomial code (`np.polyfit`) and do not carry the `component: numpy.polynomial` label, nor are they considered part of the new `numpy.polynomial` package.

The date October 1, 2012, formatted as MM/DD/YY, is 10/01/12.

<final_answer>10/01/12</final_answer>
